steps.title: Find the lower bound
steps.content: The expression $2^x$ is always positive, but it can get arbitrarily close to $0$.

steps.title: Apply the bound
steps.content:
Since $2^x$ can approach $0$, the values of $g(x)$ can approach
$$\frac{1}{13}(6\cdot0+5)=\frac{5}{13}$$
but never reach or go below it. The answer is B.
